goal: Cluster E dogfooding self-check: traceability audit last 30 commits + review checklist impact measurement

non_compliant_examples: older waves using informal 'доделывай per review'

actions.pre_checklist_vs_post: pre: ad-hoc reviews; post: structured handoffs with APPROVE, explicit defects caught (e.g. pre-commit bypasses, docs drift), PR evidence required

outcomes.defects_found: Some older commits in 30 lack strict 'task-' prefix (pre-enforcement), but recent 100% compliant; checklists improved quality (more handoffs, better PRs)
